commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `version "0.11.0"` to `Formula/wacli.rb` so Homebrew reports the wacli formula version explicitly.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection gives a clear reproduction path through installing or inspecting the current wacli formula and checking `brew list --versions wacli`; I did not rerun Homebrew locally in this read-only review.
